name: ios-qa
tagline: Performs live-device iOS QA for SwiftUI apps by connecting to a real iPhone via USB and running a vision-driven agent loop.
verdict: This skill provides a comprehensive framework for iOS QA, including detailed architecture, prerequisites, and operational modes. It handles session management, code generation for debugging, and vision-driven agent loops.
